phase_0.boundary_condition: The 17,280,000-element Crystal of Types constraint manifold self-recovering its own SIC-POVM geometry through variational inference

VINIT.justification: The void before learning: 17,280,000 configurations as raw ordinal vectors, prior to any geometric structure

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary condition: the VAE must recover 1/13 SIC overlap exactly, proving the grammar's SIC-POVM identity

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism: Crystal ordinal vectors → concentration parameters κ on S^11, mapping structural types to spherical distributions

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism: spherical latents → reconstructed primitive types, collapsing the S^11 geometry back to discrete Crystal classes

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of learned transformations: each residual block refines the vMF parameter estimation

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential measurement seed: the VAE learns the grammar's own SIC-POVM structure by encoding structural types as points on the sphere

FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication splitting the deterministic encoder output into a spherical distribution over S^11 via the vMF reparameterization trick

FFUSE.justification: Multiplication fusing the spherical latent back into discrete primitive type predictions through learned affine decoder heads

EVALT.justification: Affirmative state: the SIC overlap ⟨|⟨z_i|z_j⟩|²⟩ converges to exactly 1/13, confirming the equiangular tight frame geometry

EVALF.justification: Negative state: random directions on S^11 give expected overlap 1/12; the VAE must pull away from uniform dispersion toward 1/13

ENGAGR.justification: The Belnap BOTH state: the VAE's latent space is simultaneously uniform (random initialization) and structured (SIC convergence), held at the critical boundary

IFIX.justification: Permanent fixation of the converged weights: the vae_vita model checkpoint becomes the ROM-stored witness of the grammar's SIC-POVM self-recovery
